purpose: Inventory possible 15-thalion witness-ring sources for exploring whether the ring can provide the missing source-derived Gap A chamber/register map.
boundary: This does not claim the 15-thalion witness ring solves Gap A.
This does not alter the lift-refined Gap A theorem note.
The next pass must derive tests before using residual labels.

candidate_hypothesis.name: 15_thalion_witness_ring_gap_a_source_map_hypothesis
candidate_hypothesis.question: Can a 15-thalion witness ring derive the WXYZTI chamber/register map and explain the two residuals without overfit?
starting_constraints: Must apply to all WXYZTI rows, not only residuals.
Must derive orientation from ring position or source transport before inspecting residual labels.
Must preserve the current Gap A boundary: open, bounded, lift-refined.
Must explain ZT as branch-stable selected-turn residue.
Must explain TI as branch-sensitive return-path residue.
